subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. The servant who standeth before Us hath presented thy letter and We have heard its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و سمعه عرضه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
